# CWE-921 positive: world-readable secret file (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-921-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-921: Storage of Sensitive Data without Access Control.
// Vulnerable: API key written to /tmp with permissive mode 0644.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func StoreIntegrationKeyPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		key := r.FormValue("api_key")
		path := "/tmp/integration.key"
		if err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(key), 0644); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"stored":"/tmp/integration.key"}`))
	}
}
